---
title: "Draft — Methods & Results"
subtitle: "Internal draft for circulation"
author: "Author"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-float: true
    embed-resources: true
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 8
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

> **Status:** Working draft for internal circulation.

---

## Experimental design

Brief description of the dataset, conditions, and replication structure.

## Methods

Outline of analytical methods. Cross-link to `docs/methods.md` and `docs/methods/` for full detail.

## Results

### Result 1

![](../../results/figs/placeholder.png){fig-alt="description"}

### Result 2

## Open questions

-
